skills.name: add-component
skills.description: Add a React component in the right layer (shared/ui vs modules/<m>/components vs widgets), named export, file ≤300 lines.

skills.name: add-form
skills.description: Add a form using react-hook-form + zod. DTO colocated with the zod schema, no useState for fields.

skills.name: add-module
skills.description: Scaffold a new business-domain module under src/modules/<name>/ with folders, barrel, permissions stub, CLAUDE.md, and app registration.

skills.name: add-msw-handler
skills.description: Add or extend an MSW handler for an external API not owned by a module's RTK endpoint.

skills.name: add-page
skills.description: Add a new page to an existing module — default export for React.lazy, route registered in app/router.tsx with RBAC guard.

skills.name: add-permission
skills.description: Declare a new permission key (module-local or shared), update the Role→Permission matrix and docs/rbac.md.

skills.name: add-rtk-endpoint
skills.description: Add a new RTK Query endpoint with DTO + zod schema, providesTags/invalidatesTags, MSW handler, fixture, and module CLAUDE.md update.

skills.name: add-table
skills.description: Add a data table built on shadcn Table + RTK Query, skeleton/empty/error states, RBAC-filtered columns via <Can/>.

skills.name: add-test
skills.description: Add a unit/component test (Vitest + Testing Library) or e2e test (Playwright). Colocates the test file with the code.

skills.name: add-widget
skills.description: Add a cross-module widget under src/widgets/<Name>/. Thin compositions over module types and permission keys; never module UI or runtime.

skills.name: check-docs-sync
skills.description: Verify docs/* (the authoritative spec) matches the implementation in src/, .memory/, modules' CLAUDE.md, and eslint.config.js. Blocking gate.

skills.name: split-large-file
skills.description: Split a file >300 lines (warn) or >400 lines (ESLint error). Extracts subcomponents, hooks, and *.config.ts files.
